name: RMW - 92FS
author: Mr. Rubyyy
description: Rubyyy's Modular Weaponry - The Beretta 92FS was adopted by the US Police and Military Forces under the name "M9". It's an Italian Made 9x19mm handgun and it was adopted for it's accuracy mostly. >CONTROLS< : [MMB-Fire Selector] [RMB-Aim Down Sight] [R-Reload] [T-Attachment Menu] [SHIFT-Canting/Sprint]
